content:
IN THE COURT OF THE SESSIONS JUDGE, NOIDA

Charge Sheet No.: CS/2023/011

Accused: Manoj Verma, Ramesh Kumar, Priya Mehta

Sections: 364 (Kidnapping), 366 (Kidnapping to compel marriage or forced labor), 384 (Extortion), 465 (Forgery), 468 (Forgery for purpose of cheating), 471 (Using forged document), 201 (Destruction of evidence)

The accused, Manoj Verma, former security head of Noida Public School, conspired with Ramesh Kumar, the personal driver of Vikram Mehta, to kidnap Arjun Mehta to exact revenge for his wrongful termination after exposing Vikram Mehta’s illegal land acquisition in Sector 45. Priya Mehta, Vikram’s estranged wife and Manoj’s secret lover, forged the ₹20 lakh bank receipt to frame Rohan Mehta and diverted police attention. Ramesh Kumar used his knowledge of Arjun’s routine and vehicle tracking device to disable the smartwatch and lure Arjun into the SUV. The ransom note, printed using Vikram’s office printer, was designed to mislead investigators into believing government involvement. The stolen motorcycle was used as a decoy to implicate Bittu Singh. The accused fled via a pre-planned tunnel to a farmhouse in Ballabhgarh. Evidence includes CCTV, forensic ink analysis, digital forensics, and recovered tracker device. All accused are charged under IPC Sections as above. The prosecution seeks maximum punishment.
